name: Swing Zone
about: Swing Zone Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue offering a full-service experience with a bar, food, and event hosting capabilities. The facility features six GOLFZON VISION simulator bays, each accommodating up to six players. Bays are rented by the hour, with a minimum booking time of 30 minutes. On average, it takes about one hour for an individual to play 18 holes. Pricing varies by day of the week, ranging from $25 to $45 per hour, with a full bar and food service available. The venue is a climate-controlled space suitable for individuals, groups, and private events.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art GOLFZON VISION simulators provide the most realistic golf experience
Advanced swing analysis with streaming video and statistics to a smartphone app
Access to over 160 real-life famous golf courses from around the world
Indoor climate-controlled environment playable day or night, regardless of weather

food_and_drink.notes: A variety of food and snacks served in your bay or at the bar
Full bar service with a variety of alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry leader, official simulator of the LPGA, featuring high-speed camera sensors and 3D graphics

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, complimentary loaner clubs are provided.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or beverages?
faq.answer: No. A variety of beverages and food options are available for purchase on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On average, it takes about one hour for an individual to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is Swing Zone kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Swing Zone is a family-friendly environment for all ages. Children under 16 must be accompanied by an adult at all times.
